unresolved: JsonNode.get(int) is annotated @Override and implements TreeNode.get(int) from jackson-core (external dependency, not in this repo); if the parameter/return type changes, TreeNode must change too, but that edit is out of repo scope. Other Jackson modules and external callers that consume JsonNode.get(int) are likewise out of scope. In-repo coverage (declaration, all overrides, all call sites) is believed exhaustive based on multi-agent + ripgrep cross-verification; the only residual risk is a non-chained get(int) call on a node-typed receiver in a test file that pattern-based greps could miss.
